data:
[{"operationName":"ViewerQuery","variables":{},"query":"query ViewerQuery {
  viewer {
    ...ViewerFragment
    __typename
  }
}

fragment ViewerFragment on User {
  __typename
  id
  username
  name
  imageId
  mediumMemberAt
  hasPastMemberships
  isPartnerProgramEnrolled
  email
  unverifiedEmail
  createdAt
  isAuroraVisible
  isEligibleToViewNewResponses
  isMembershipTrialEligible
  isSuspended
  styleEditorOnboardingVersionSeen
  allowEmailAddressSharingEditorWriter
  hasSubdomain
  dismissableFlags
  hasWebMembershipTrialEnabled
  hasGroupGiftingEnabled
  twitterScreenName
  geolocation {
    country
    __typename
  }
  atsQualifiedAt
  postSubscribeMembershipUpsellShownAt
  hightowerTermsAcceptedAt
  isEligibleToImportEmails
}
"}]

data:
[{"operationName":"ViewerQuery","variables":{},"query":"query ViewerQuery {
  viewer {
    ...ViewerFragment
    __typename
  }
}

fragment ViewerFragment on User {
  __typename
  id
  username
  name
  imageId
  mediumMemberAt
  hasPastMemberships
  isPartnerProgramEnrolled
  email
  unverifiedEmail
  createdAt
  isAuroraVisible
  isEligibleToViewNewResponses
  isMembershipTrialEligible
  isSuspended
  styleEditorOnboardingVersionSeen
  allowEmailAddressSharingEditorWriter
  hasSubdomain
  dismissableFlags
  hasWebMembershipTrialEnabled
  hasGroupGiftingEnabled
  twitterScreenName
  geolocation {
    country
    __typename
  }
  atsQualifiedAt
  postSubscribeMembershipUpsellShownAt
  hightowerTermsAcceptedAt
  isEligibleToImportEmails
}
"}]
